title: Text editor
description: Text-editor app window kind via ctx.registerWindowKind (extracted from core, #83). CodeMirror, multi-tab AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md docs, dirty-save, find, line numbers, host/folder pickers. /file/* I/O rides ctx.file. Persists byte-identical to webterm:appwindows:v1 incl. filePath/wrap/lineNums/startDir/docs/activeTab/agentsMdCwd/fileHostId.
author: JohnConnorNPC
